name: eden-growth-os-validation-agents

lanes.purpose: Validate trend, keyword, phrase, hashtag, competitor, audience, and performance signals.
Score opportunities by trend, competition, velocity, audience match, and conversion value.
Verify persona, platform, account label, screen name, and approval state before execution.
Version prompts, pause weak prompts, and connect prompt performance to outcomes.
Validate realism, source consistency, duplicate risk, storage, and approval status.
Validate captions, hooks, scripts, hashtag sets, platform fit, and brand safety.
Import Metricool, Shopify, Vercel, and Supabase performance metrics.
Find stale jobs, failed providers, missing env vars, storage failures, and queue problems.
Safely retry or quarantine low-risk internal failures without public consequences.
Check auth, rate limits, RLS, receipts, route modes, and unsafe configuration.
Convert outcomes into scale, stop, and test-next decisions.

next_provider_step: Wire Vercel agent provisioning adapter, then convert this manifest into live Vercel Agent config.
